name: Regional & Federated Gateway Dashboard
description: Business-oriented dashboard for a multi-country telco API platform operating centralized governance with federated API runtimes.
businessStory: A regional telco group wants one API business model, but execution must happen close to each market, cloud, edge location and partner ecosystem. The platform governs centrally while gateway runtimes operate regionally.
businessOutcome: Accelerates multi-country rollout, reduces operational fragmentation and gives business teams visibility into API products, runtime health, commercial exposure and regional readiness.

controlPlane.name: WSO2 API Manager Control Plane
controlPlane.role: Central API design, lifecycle, governance, productization, subscription, policy and analytics coordination.

federatedRuntimes.businessFocus: Open Gateway fraud APIs and partner onboarding

federatedRuntimes.runtimeType: WSO2 Universal Gateway + Kafka event bridge
federatedRuntimes.businessFocus: 5G monetization, BSS exposure and event-native products

federationModel.description: API standards, lifecycle gates, security policies and metadata rules remain centrally governed.
Each country or runtime cluster can execute traffic locally while still following global policy.
API products, plans and billing metadata are aligned across countries for regional partners.
REST, SOAP, streaming and Kafka-style event products are represented in the same operating model.
